law_title_en: Decree on the Implementation of the Executive Bylaw of the Export and Import Regulations Act for the Year 1372 (1993/94)
law_title_fa: تصويبنامه در خصوص اجراي آيين نامه اجرايي قانون مقررات صادرات و واردات در سال 1372
current_justification_en: This 1993 decree formally puts the Import/Export Regulations executive bylaw into force for the 1372 (1993/94) trade year, making it the direct legal basis for that year's licensing and customs terms, a more immediate link to the corresponding year's trade figures than a routine clause amendment.

law_title_en: Deletion of a Phrase from the Resolution Exempting Automobiles Needed by the Military Forces from Clause (c) and the Remarks of Chapter 87 of the Table Annexed to the Executive Bylaw of the Export and Import Regulations Act
law_title_fa: حذف عبارتي از مصوبه مستثني بودن اتومبيلهاي مورد نياز نيروهاي نظامي از بند ج و ملاحظات فصل 87 جدول ضميمه آئين نامه اجرائي
current_justification_en: This 1989 decree removes a phrase from an exemption clause of the Import/Export Regulations bylaw, narrowing a specific customs exemption within Iran's trade-licensing regime during the war-reconstruction period.

law_title_en: Legal Bill on Providing a Credit of Ten Billion to Bank Refah Kargaran through the Central Bank of Iran
law_title_fa: لايحه قانوني راجع  به تأمين ده ميليارد اعتبار براي بانك رفاه كارگران توسط بانك مركزي ايران
targets_named_charts: Government Debt to the Central Bank
current_justification_en: This 1979 decree has the Central Bank of Iran extend a 10-billion-rial credit facility to the Workers' Welfare Bank, a direct monetary-policy transaction of the kind recorded in Iran's central-bank-to-government/banking-system debt series during the immediate post-revolution period.

law_title_en: Act Amending Note 5 of the Act Amending the Act on Increasing Agricultural Credits
law_title_fa: قانون راجع باصلاح تبصره 5 قانون اصلاح قانون افزايش اعتبارات كشاورزي
current_justification_en: This 1960 amendment revises note 5 of the law increasing agricultural credit, a named instrument that directly expanded the volume of credit channelled to the farm sector, with a real if hard-to-isolate link to agricultural investment, output and rural development statistics.

law_title_en: In Implementation of Note 3 of Article 2 of the Land Reform Act
law_title_fa: در اجراي تبصره 3 ماده 2 قانون اصلاحات ارضي
current_justification_en: This 1962 decree operationalises Article 2 of Iran's Land Reform Law by setting out how the state's share in commonly-owned estates is partitioned among landlords ahead of transfer to peasants. As the implementing machinery of the first-stage Land Reform, the headline instrument of the White Revolution, it belongs on any serious account of Iran's growth path through the 1960s-70s alongside oil rev

law_title_en: In Implementation of Note 3 of Article 2 of the Land Reform Act
law_title_fa: در اجراي تبصره 3 ماده 2 قانون اصلاحات ارضي
current_justification_en: By governing how state-owned shares of jointly-held land were divided and transferred, this decree is a direct operational piece of Iran's land redistribution, the single largest change to landownership and farm structure in modern Iranian history, with a real channel into agricultural land-use, production and land-wealth-concentration statistics.

law_title_en: Decree on Adding Four Clauses to a Part ... Executive Bylaw of the Export and Import Regulations Act
law_title_fa: تصويبنامه راجع به الحاق چهار بند به قسمت ... نامه اجرائي قانون مقررات صادرات و واردات
current_justification_en: This 1991 decree adds four new clauses to the Import/Export Regulations bylaw, a more substantive package of trade-policy changes than a single-note amendment, plausibly touching several categories of licensed goods.

law_title_en: Addition of Notes 5 and 6 to Article 8 of the Amendment ... Free Trade-Industrial Zones of the Islamic Republic of Iran
law_title_fa: الحاق تبصره هاي  5  و  6  به ماده  8  اص ... ق آزاد تجاري - صنعتي جمهوري اسلامي ايران
current_justification_en: This 2018 amendment adds two tariff/duty notes to Article 8 of the Free Trade-Industrial Zones Law's executive bylaw, a specific customs-duty channel with a more direct, named link to import-duty revenue than a generic procedural clause.

law_title_en: Amendment to the Note under Article 3 of the Executive Bylaw on Credit Facilities for the Employment of War-Displaced Migrants
law_title_fa: اصلاح تبصره ذيل ماده 3 آئيننامه اجرائي تسهيلات اعتباري اشتغال مهاجرين جنگ تحميلي
current_justification_en: This 1988 amendment revises the credit-facility terms of the executive bylaw on employment credit for migrants displaced by the Iran-Iraq war, a targeted labour-market instrument from the war-economy period.

law_title_en: Executive Bylaw of the Act on the Repayment of Bonds for Expanding Ownership of Production Units
law_title_fa: آئيننامه اجرائي قانون بازپرداخت اوراق قرضه گسترش مالكيت واحدهاي توليدي
current_justification_en: This 1989 bylaw governs repayment of bonds issued under Iran's 'broadening ownership of production units' scheme, an early mechanism for distributing shares of state-linked enterprises to the public, a direct financing instrument of the kind that shaped the development of Iran's capital market ahead of the later Article 44 privatisation drive.

law_title_en: Amendment to the Executive Bylaw of the Export and Import Regulations Act
law_title_fa: اصلاح آيين نامه اجرايي قانون مقررات صادرات و واردات
current_justification_en: This 2000 amendment further revises the executive bylaw of the Import/Export Regulations Law, one more increment in the continuous administrative fine-tuning of Iran's customs and trade-licensing terms.

law_title_en: Amendment to Article 4 of the Executive Bylaw of the Export and Import Regulations Act, Approved in 1372 (1993/94)
law_title_fa: اصلاح ماده   4   آيين نامه اجرايي قانون مقررات صادرات و واردات - مصوب 1372 -
current_justification_en: This 2007 amendment revises Article 4 of the Import/Export Regulations bylaw, a tariff/customs-classification clause with a named, if narrow, channel to Iran's customs-duty revenue.

law_title_en: Amendment to the Executive Bylaw of the Export and Import Regulations Act
law_title_fa: اصلاحيه آيين  نامه اجرايي قانون مقررات صادرات و واردات
current_justification_en: This 1998 amendment revises the executive bylaw of the Import/Export Regulations Law, another routine step in the ongoing administrative regulation of Iran's trade-licensing and customs regime.

law_title_en: Amendment to Article 48 of the Executive Bylaw of the Export and Import Regulations Act
law_title_fa: اصلاح  ماده  48 آئين  نامه اجرايي  قانون  مقررات  صادرات  و واردات
current_justification_en: This 1991 amendment revises Article 48 of the Import/Export Regulations bylaw, one more procedural clause within Iran's standing trade-licensing and customs framework.

law_title_en: Amendment to Article 53 of the Executive Bylaw of the Export and Import Regulations Act for the Year 1365 (1986)
law_title_fa: اصلاحيه ماده 53 آيين نامه اجرايي قانون مقررات صادرات و واردات سال 65
current_justification_en: This 1986 amendment to Article 53 of the Import/Export Regulations executive bylaw adjusted licensing/procedural detail within the core administrative framework that governs all recorded merchandise trade.

law_title_en: Amendment to the Executive Bylaw on the Collection of Duties in the Free Trade-Industrial Zones of the Islamic Republic of Iran
law_title_fa: اصلاح آيين نامه اجرائي اخذ عوارض در مناطق آزاد تجاري - صنعتي جمهوري اسلامي ايران
current_justification_en: This 2021 amendment to the free trade/industrial zone duty (avarez) collection bylaw adjusts a minor revenue-collection mechanism within the customs and import-duty system.

law_title_en: Amendment to the Directive and Executive Procedure of the Bylaw on the Collection of Duties in the Free Trade-Industrial Zones
law_title_fa: اصلاح دستورالعمل و روش اجرايي آيين نامه اخذ عوارض در مناطق آزاد تجاري - صنعتي
current_justification_en: This 2006 amendment to the instructions for free-zone duty collection adjusts implementation procedure within the customs-duty revenue system.

law_title_en: Cabinet Resolution on Converting the Note to Article 28 into ... the Executive Bylaw of the Export and Import Regulations Act
law_title_fa: تصويبنامه راجع به تبديل تبصره ماده 28 به ... نامه اجرائي قانون مقررات صادرات و واردات
current_justification_en: This 1989 decree converts a clause into a standalone article within the Import/Export Regulations executive bylaw, part of the postwar reconstruction-era overhaul of the trade licensing regime.

law_title_en: Amendment to Decree No. 49751/T55549H ... Executive Bylaw of the Export and Import Regulations Act
law_title_fa: اصلاح تصويب نامه شماره 49751 ت55549هـ مو ... امه اجرايي قانون مقررات صادرات و واردات
current_justification_en: This 2018 amendment to the government decree implementing the Import/Export Regulations bylaw updates trade-administration procedure during the sanctions-era trade regime.

law_title_en: Amendment to Decree No. 55327/T20486K Dated 1/10/1377 (December 22, 1998) on the Addition of Note (3) to Amended Clause 8 of the Directive and Implementation Method of the Bylaw on the Collection of Charges in Free Trade-Industrial Zones
law_title_fa: اصلاحيه تصويب نامه شماره 55327 /ت 20486 ك مورخ 1 /10 /1377 با موضوع اضافه شدن تبصره (3) به بند 8 اصلاحي دستورالعمل و روش
current_justification_en: This undated amendment to the free-zone duty collection decree adjusts a minor component of customs/import-duty administration.

law_title_en: Amendment to the Executive Bylaw of the Export and Import Regulations Act
law_title_fa: اصلاحيه آيين نامه اجرايي قانون مقررات صادرات و واردات
current_justification_en: This 2002 amendment to the Import/Export Regulations executive bylaw updates the core administrative rules governing merchandise trade licensing during the Khatami-era trade liberalization drive.

law_title_en: Bylaw for Implementing the Note to Clause (a) of an Article ... General Policies of Article 44 of the Constitution
law_title_fa: آيين نامه اجراي تبصره بند   الف   ماده   ... سياستهاي كلي اصل چهل و چهارم قانون اساسي
current_justification_en: The 2009 executive bylaw implementing Article 44 general policies operationalized Iran's largest privatization program, transferring state enterprises to the private/quasi-private sector; a national-scale structural reform of this kind belongs in any serious account of GDP and investment.

law_title_en: Bylaw for Implementing the Note to Clause (a) of an Article ... General Policies of Article 44 of the Constitution
law_title_fa: آيين نامه اجراي تبصره بند   الف   ماده   ... سياستهاي كلي اصل چهل و چهارم قانون اساسي
current_justification_en: Article 44 privatization used listing of state-owned enterprise shares on the Tehran Stock Exchange as its principal transfer mechanism, directly expanding listed-company count, market capitalization, and trading volume.

law_title_en: Bylaw for Implementing the Note to Clause (a) of an Article ... General Policies of Article 44 of the Constitution
law_title_fa: آيين نامه اجراي تبصره بند   الف   ماده   ... سياستهاي كلي اصل چهل و چهارم قانون اساسي
current_justification_en: By reducing the state's direct role in production, the bylaw was intended to widen space for private business formation.

law_title_en: Directive on the Initial Offering and Secondary Trading of Participation Bonds on the Securities Exchange
law_title_fa: دستورالعمل عرضه اوليه و داد و ستد دست دوم اوراق مشاركت در بورس اوراق بهادار
current_justification_en: This 2005 directive regulating primary offering and secondary trading of participation bonds on the stock exchange expanded a debt-instrument channel within Iran's capital market.

law_title_en: Directive on Commodity and Commodity-Based Securities Trading on the Iran Mercantile Exchange
law_title_fa: دستورالعمل معاملات كالا و اوراق بهادار مبتني بر كالا در بورس كالاي ايران
current_justification_en: This 2010 directive on commodity and commodity-backed securities trading on the Iran Mercantile Exchange formalized organized price discovery for agricultural and industrial commodities.

law_title_en: Directive on the Issuance of Ijarah Bonds
law_title_fa: دستورالعمل انتشار اوراق اجاره
current_justification_en: This 2011 directive on the issuance of lease (ijarah) bonds added a Sharia-compliant financing instrument to Iran's capital market.

law_title_en: Directive on the Purchase, Sale, Transport, and Keeping of Live Livestock
law_title_fa: دستورالعمل خريد، فروش، حمل و نگهداري دام زنده
current_justification_en: This 2019 directive on the purchase, sale, and transport of live livestock regulates the marketing chain for a category that directly feeds into the recorded livestock price series.

law_title_en: Directive on the Settlement of Foreign-Currency Debts of Executive Agencies
law_title_fa: دستورالعمل تسويه بدهي ارزي دستگاههاي اجرايي
targets_named_charts: External debt stocks, public and publicly guaranteed (PPG)
current_justification_en: This 1998 directive settling the foreign-exchange debts of government executive agencies is a direct instrument acting on Iran's external debt stock and, through demand for hard currency to clear those debts, on the exchange-rate gap.

law_title_en: Bylaw Concerning Coupons and Rationing Booklets
law_title_fa: آئين نامه راجع به كوپنها و دفترچه هاي جيره بندي
current_justification_en: The 1944 rationing bylaw (coupons and ration booklets) was a direct wartime price/quantity-control instrument on staple goods; the scarcity and controls it codified are part of the same wartime economy that produced a wide official/parallel exchange-rate gap in this period.

law_title_en: Bylaw Concerning Coupons and Rationing Booklets
law_title_fa: آئين نامه راجع به كوپنها و دفترچه هاي جيره بندي
current_justification_en: As a formal price/quantity-control regime on staple goods, this 1944 bylaw is historical context for Iran's long-run inflation and price-control story, even though it predates the modern CPI series carried on the site.

law_title_en: Ruling No. 762-761-760 of the General Board of the Administrative Justice Court ... Regarding Purchase of Subsidized Petroleum Products Outside the Distribution Network
law_title_fa: رأي شماره762ـ761ـ760 هيأت عمومي ديوان عد ... ام خريد خارج از شبكه مواد سوبسيددار نفتي
current_justification_en: This 2013 administrative court ruling on off-network purchase of subsidized petroleum-linked goods addresses enforcement of Iran's fuel-subsidy distribution mechanism, part of the subsidies-and-transfers spending captured in this series.

law_title_en: Ruling No. 25 of the General Board of the Administrative Justice Court ... Dated 21/12/1372 (March 12, 1994), Regarding Value-Added Duty
law_title_fa: رأي شماره 25 هيئت عمومي ديوان عدالت ادار ...  مورخ 21 12  72درخصوص عوارض ارزش افزو ده
current_justification_en: This 1996 administrative court ruling interprets value-added duties (avarez), touching the goods-and-services tax component of government revenue.

law_title_en: بخنشنامه گمرك در خصوص نرخ حقوق ورودي خودرو بند  ر  تبصره  يك  قانون بودجه سال 1404
law_title_fa: بخنشنامه گمرك در خصوص نرخ حقوق ورودي خودرو بند  ر  تبصره  يك  قانون بودجه سال 1404
targets_named_charts: Tariff rate, applied, weighted mean, all products
current_justification_en: This 2025 customs circular sets the vehicle import duty rate under a clause of the FY1404 budget law, a direct instrument on both customs-duty revenue and the applied tariff rate.

law_title_en: بخنشنامه گمرك در خصوص نرخ حقوق ورودي خودرو بند  ر  تبصره  يك  قانون بودجه سال 1404
law_title_fa: بخنشنامه گمرك در خصوص نرخ حقوق ورودي خودرو بند  ر  تبصره  يك  قانون بودجه سال 1404
targets_named_charts: National Motor Vehicle Production (incl. Paykan/Iran Khodro Milestones)
current_justification_en: Import duty rates on vehicles indirectly affect the competitive position of domestic vehicle production by changing the relative price of imported cars.

law_title_en: Act Amending the Bank Nationalization Act
law_title_fa: لايحه قانوني اصلاح قانون ملي شدن بانكها مصوب 1358 3 17 شوراي انقلاب اسلامي
targets_named_charts: Government Debt to the Central Bank
current_justification_en: This 1979 amendment to the bank nationalization law restructured the post-revolutionary state banking system's relationship with the central bank, a direct instrument on government debt to the Central Bank in exactly the period this chart begins.

law_title_en: Act Amending the Bank Nationalization Act
law_title_fa: لايحه قانوني اصلاح قانون ملي شدن بانكها مصوب 1358 3 17 شوراي انقلاب اسلامي
current_justification_en: Bank nationalization is the foundational structural reform of Iran's post-revolutionary financial sector; any serious account of Iran's monetary aggregates and credit system must reference it.

law_title_en: Act Amending the Bank Nationalization Act
law_title_fa: لايحه قانوني اصلاح قانون ملي شدن بانكها مصوب 1358 3 17 شوراي انقلاب اسلامي
current_justification_en: As the central structural reform of the post-revolutionary financial system, bank nationalization reshaped credit allocation to the whole economy and belongs in any serious account of Iran's GDP path through the 1980s.

law_title_en: Legal Bill Amending the Legal Bill Concerning the Extension of the 1357 (1978-1979) Fiscal Year of All Nationalized Banks and Credit Institutions until 17/3/1358 (June 7, 1979)
law_title_fa: لايحه قانوني اصلاح لايحه قانوني راجع به ادامه سال مالي 1357 كليه بانكها و مؤسسات اعتباري ملي شده تا 17/3/58
targets_named_charts: Government Debt to the Central Bank
current_justification_en: This 1980 amendment further adjusted the nationalization of banks and credit institutions, part of the same restructuring of state-bank/central-bank relations reflected in government debt to the Central Bank.

law_title_en: Legal Bill Amending the Legal Bill Concerning the Extension of the 1357 (1978-1979) Fiscal Year of All Nationalized Banks and Credit Institutions until 17/3/1358 (June 7, 1979)
law_title_fa: لايحه قانوني اصلاح لايحه قانوني راجع به ادامه سال مالي 1357 كليه بانكها و مؤسسات اعتباري ملي شده تا 17/3/58
current_justification_en: As part of the nationalized-bank legal framework, this amendment bears generally on Iran's early-1980s monetary and credit system.

law_title_en: Legal Bill Authorizing the Central Bank of Iran to Grant a Loan of Three Billion Rials to Bank Maskan (Housing Bank)
law_title_fa: لايحه قانوني راجع به اجازه به بانك مركزي ايران در مورد اعطاي سه ميليارد ريال وام به بانك مسكن
targets_named_charts: Government Debt to the Central Bank
current_justification_en: This 1980 decree authorizing the Central Bank to extend a 3-billion-rial loan to the Housing Bank is a discrete credit-policy action within the domestic credit and central-bank financing system of the early revolutionary period.

law_title_en: Act Adding Two Notes to the Guaranteed Purchase of Essential Agricultural Products Act of 1989
law_title_fa: قانون الحاق دو تبصره به قانون تضمين خريد محصولات اساسي كشاورزي مصوب 1368
targets_named_charts: Government-Guaranteed Wheat Procurement Price, Common & Durum (2013-2026)
current_justification_en: This 2005 amendment adds two clauses to the 1989 guaranteed-purchase-price law requiring the government to raise the guaranteed procurement price for basic crops by at least the announced inflation rate each year, directly setting the floor for this series.

law_title_en: Act Adding Two Notes to the Guaranteed Purchase of Essential Agricultural Products Act of 1989
law_title_fa: قانون الحاق دو تبصره به قانون تضمين خريد محصولات اساسي كشاورزي مصوب 1368
current_justification_en: The guaranteed-purchase-price regime this law amends covers all 'basic' agricultural crops, not just wheat, so it shapes producer prices across the guaranteed-purchase basket.

law_title_en: Act Extending the Time Limits Prescribed in Article 40 of the Bylaw ... and Adding Eight Articles to the Land Reform Bylaw
law_title_fa: قانون تمديد مهلت هاي مقرر در ماده 40 آئي ... الحاق هشت ماده به آئين نامه اصلاحات ارضي
current_justification_en: This 1970 law extends administrative deadlines under the land-reform bylaw for bringing confiscated and idle estates into cultivation, part of the broader land-reform program that reshaped agricultural land use in this era.

law_title_en: Legal Bill on Increasing the Amount of Loans ... under Contracts with Tobacco Growers and Tea Growers Approved in the Year 1347 (1968/69)
law_title_fa: لايحه قانوني راجع به افزايش رقم وامهاي پ ... ي با توتونكاران و چايكاران مصوب سال 1347
current_justification_en: This 1980 bylaw raises the ceiling on loans/subsidized advances available to tobacco and tea growers, a real financing channel that can support planted area and output in these two crops.

law_title_en: Act on Converting the Status of Bank Sepah into a Joint-Stock Company
law_title_fa: قانون مربوط به تبديل وضع بانك سپه بصورت شركت سهامي
targets_named_charts: Deposit Banks vs. National Bank Private-Sector Deposits/Advances, 1957-1959
current_justification_en: This 1955 law converts Bank Sepah into a joint-stock company, a legal restructuring of one of Iran's largest state banks that shaped its commercial lending capacity in the following years covered by this deposit/lending series.

law_title_en: Act Authorizing the Establishment of the Bank of Foreign Trade of Iran
law_title_fa: قانون راجع باجازه تشكيل بانك تجارت خارجي ايران
current_justification_en: This 1959 law authorizes creation of Iran's Foreign Trade Bank (Bank Tejarat's predecessor institution focus), a dedicated trade-finance institution that became part of the banking system's monetary and credit aggregates.

law_title_en: Act Authorizing the Establishment of the Bank of Foreign Trade of Iran
law_title_fa: قانون راجع باجازه تشكيل بانك تجارت خارجي ايران
targets_named_charts: Exports of goods and services (annual % growth)
Imports of goods and services (annual % growth)
current_justification_en: A dedicated foreign-trade bank provides financing and guarantees that can facilitate import and export transactions, a real if modest channel into aggregate trade flows.

law_title_en: Act Authorizing the Payment of Export Bonuses for Goods Exported in the Year 1381 (2002/03) from the Year 1382 (2003/04) Budget Credits
law_title_fa: قانون اجازه پرداخت جايزه صادراتي كالاهاي صادر شده در سال 1381 از محل اعتبارات سال 1382
current_justification_en: This 2003 law authorizes payment of export bonuses for goods exported in 1381 (2002/03), a targeted fiscal incentive of the kind used to support non-oil export value.

law_title_en: Legal Bill on the Method of Securing Customs Duties and Commercial Benefit Tax and Extending Collection Guarantee Letters
law_title_fa: لايحه قانوني نحوه تأمين حقوق گمركي و سود بازرگاني و تمديد ضمانتنامه هاي وصولي
current_justification_en: This 1979 bylaw sets the financing mechanism for guaranteeing collection of customs duties and the commercial-profit tax, a direct administrative instrument governing how much of assessed import duties is actually collected.

law_title_en: Amendment to Note 4 of the Act on the Amendment and Implementation of the Customs Tariff
law_title_fa: اصلاح تبصره چهار قانون اصلاح و اجراي تعرفه گمركي
current_justification_en: This 1951 amendment to note 4 of the customs-tariff implementation law gives government purchases preference to barter-basis imported goods, a trade-policy tool affecting the composition rather than the tariff level of imports.

law_title_en: Act on the Administration of the Housing Foundation and Transactions of Housing Units
law_title_fa: قانون راجع به نحوه اداره بنياد مسكن و معاملات واحدهاي مسكوني
targets_named_charts: Housing Units by Number of Resident Households, Census Years (1966-2006)
current_justification_en: This 1981 law governs how the post-revolution Housing Foundation (Bonyad Maskan) administers and transfers housing units, a direct instrument shaping the housing-unit stock captured in this census series.

law_title_en: Act Authorizing the National Iranian Steel Company to Obtain Loans and Credit
law_title_fa: قانون اجازه اخذ وام و اعتبارات بشركت ملي ذوب آهن ايران
current_justification_en: This 1972 law authorizes loans and credit facilities for the National Iranian Steel Company, directly financing the Isfahan steel-mill capacity that came online and is captured in this crude-steel-production series starting 1973.

law_title_en: Act Authorizing the Exchange of the Second Supplementary Agreement to the Oil and Gas Sales Agreement Approved in Aban 1333 (October/November 1954)
law_title_fa: قانون اجازه مبادله قرارداد الحاقي دوم به قرارداد فروش نفت و گاز مصوب آبانماه 1333
current_justification_en: This 1967 law ratifies the Second Supplementary Agreement to the 1954 oil consortium contract, redrawing the boundaries of the Consortium's operating area and thereby the geographic scope available for oil production and revenue.

law_title_en: Act Authorizing the Transfer of a Fifty Percent Undivided Share of the Rights and Interests of the Continental Oil Company of Iran to the Phillips Petroleum Company of Iran
law_title_fa: قانون اجازه انتقال پنجاه درصد مشاع از حقوق و منافع شركت نفت كنتينانتال ايران بشركت نفت فيليپس ايران
current_justification_en: This 1971 law authorizes transferring a 50% undivided interest in an oil concession held by Continental Iran to Phillips Petroleum Iran, a company-level ownership change in one of several offshore concession consortia active in this period.

law_title_en: Act on the Allocation of 14.7 Million Dollars of the Oil Signing Bonus Received from the Pan American Company
law_title_fa: قانون راجع به نحوه تقسيم مبلغ چهارده ميليون و هفتصد هزار دلار از محل 25 ميليون دلار پذيره نفت دريافتي از شركت پان آمريكن
current_justification_en: This 1958 law sets how a $14 million oil-exploration signing bonus received from Pan American is distributed among budget, NIOC, and Plan Organization recipients, a direct instance of the oil-revenue allocation mechanism this chart tracks.

law_title_en: Authorization of Future-Year Credit for Iran's Second Gas Trunk Pipeline
law_title_fa: اجازه اعتبار سنوات آتي شاه لوله دوم گاز ايران
current_justification_en: This 1976 law authorizes multi-year credit for constructing Iran's second gas trunk pipeline (IGAT-II), infrastructure investment intended to expand gas transport and export capacity that underlies natural-gas rents.

law_title_en: Water Tariff Collection Act for Organizations and Companies under the Ministry of Water and Power
law_title_fa: قانون وصول بهاي آب سازمانها و شركت هاي تابع وزارت آب و برق
current_justification_en: Establishes statutory water tariffs collected by companies under the Ministry of Water and Power, part of the administered-price apparatus that historically fed into the broader cost-of-living/consumer price basket.

law_title_en: Act Amending Certain Articles of the Third Economic, Social, and Cultural Development Plan Act of the Islamic Republic of Iran and Its Subsequent Amendments
law_title_fa: قانون اصلاح موادي از قانون برنامه سوم تو ... گي جمهوري اسلامي ايران و اصلاحات بعدي آن
current_justification_en: Amends the Third Five-Year Development Plan (2000-2005), Iran's national medium-term economic programme covering investment targets, privatization, and public spending ceilings; any serious account of GDP, investment, or government expenditure in this period must reference the Plan framework.

law_title_en: Act Amending Certain Articles of the Third Economic, Social, and Cultural Development Plan Act of the Islamic Republic of Iran and Its Subsequent Amendments
law_title_fa: قانون اصلاح موادي از قانون برنامه سوم تو ... گي جمهوري اسلامي ايران و اصلاحات بعدي آن
targets_named_charts: Industry (including construction), value added (% of GDP)
current_justification_en: The Third Plan set industrial-sector targets and privatization timelines directly bearing on industrial and manufacturing value added.

law_title_en: Act on Financial, Administrative, and Employment Regulations of the Ministry of Agricultural Jihad
law_title_fa: قانون مقررات مالي،اداري و استخدامي وزارت جهاد كشاورزي
targets_named_charts: Agriculture, forestry, and fishing, value added (annual % growth)
Agriculture, forestry, and fishing, value added (% of GDP)
current_justification_en: Sets the financial, administrative, and staffing rules for the Ministry of Agricultural Jihad, the state body that runs most agricultural policy and support programmes, giving it an indirect bearing on the sector's output.

law_title_en: Act Amending Clause (h) of Note 3 of the Budget Law for the Year 1372 (1993/94)
law_title_fa: قانون اصلاح بند  هـ  تبصره  3  قانون بودجه سال 1372كل كشور
current_justification_en: Amends a specific clause (Note 3, item h) of the 1372 (1993) Annual Budget Law, one of the many statutory pieces that make up that year's recorded budget totals.

law_title_en: Act Amending Clause (b) of Note 2 of the Budget Law for the Year 1372 (1993/94)
law_title_fa: قانون اصلاح بند ب تبصره 2 قانون بودجه سال 1372 كل كشور
current_justification_en: Amends a specific clause (Note 2, item b) of the 1372 (1993) Annual Budget Law, part of the statutory basis for that year's recorded budget totals.

law_title_en: Rejection of the Bill to Add a Note to Clause 10 of Article 1 of the Land Reform Amendment Act
law_title_fa: رد لايحه اضافه نمودن تبصره به بند 10 ماده اول قانون اصلاحي قانون اصلاحات ارضي
targets_named_charts: Agriculture, forestry, and fishing, value added (annual % growth)
Agriculture, forestry, and fishing, value added (% of GDP)
current_justification_en: Parliament's rejection of a proposed addition to Article 1(10) of the Corrective Land Reform Law kept the existing land-redistribution regime intact during a period that reshaped landholding patterns and agricultural output.

law_title_en: Rejection of the Bill to Add a Note to Clause 10 of Article 1 of the Land Reform Amendment Act
law_title_fa: رد لايحه اضافه نمودن تبصره به بند 10 ماده اول قانون اصلاحي قانون اصلاحات ارضي
current_justification_en: Land reform is one of the central pillars of the White Revolution-era modernisation programme that any serious account of Iran's 1960s-70s GDP path must mention; this document is part of the legal record of how that reform was implemented and defended against rollback.

law_title_en: Directive on the Method of Determining the Purchase and Sale Price of Securities in Investment Funds
law_title_fa: دستورالعمل نحوه تعيين قيمت خريد و فروش اوراق بهادار در صندوق هاي سرمايه گذاري
current_justification_en: Sets the methodology for pricing securities bought and sold by investment funds, a rule that directly shapes how Iran's capital-market trading and valuation data are generated.

law_title_en: Amendment to Article 4 of the Executive Bylaw of the Note to Article 77 of the Act on Combating the Smuggling of Goods and Currency
law_title_fa: اصلاح ماده  4  آيين نامه اجرايي تبصره ماده  77  قانون مبارزه با قاچاق كالا و ارز
current_justification_en: Amends the executive bylaw for combating currency and goods smuggling under Note to Article 77 of the Anti-Smuggling Law, a direct enforcement lever against the black-market currency trade that drives the gap between official and parallel exchange rates.

law_title_en: Amendment to Article 4 of the Executive Bylaw of the Note to Article 77 of the Act on Combating the Smuggling of Goods and Currency
law_title_fa: اصلاح ماده  4  آيين نامه اجرايي تبصره ماده  77  قانون مبارزه با قاچاق كالا و ارز
current_justification_en: Tighter anti-smuggling enforcement can shift some previously unrecorded goods flows into (or out of) officially measured merchandise trade.

law_title_en: Amendment to the Executive Bylaw for Clause (t) of Note 9 of the Budget Law for the Year 1379 (2000/01)
law_title_fa: اصلاحيه آيين نامه اجرايي بند  ط  تبصره  9  قانون بودجه سال 1379 كل كشور
current_justification_en: Amends the executive bylaw for Note (item T/ط) of the 1379 (2000) Annual Budget Law, part of that year's statutory budget-execution framework.

law_title_en: Amendment to the Executive Bylaw of Note 16 of the Budget Law for the Year 1373 (1994/95)
law_title_fa: اصلاح آيين نامه اجرايي تبصره 16 قانون بودجه سال 1373 كل كشور
current_justification_en: Amends the executive bylaw for Note 16 of the 1373 (1995) Annual Budget Law, part of that year's budget-execution framework.

law_title_en: Amendment to the Executive Bylaw of Article (61) of the Act on the Collection of Certain Government Revenues and Their Expenditure for Specified Purposes
law_title_fa: اصلاحيه آئين نامه اجرايي ماده (61) قانون وصول برخي از درآمدهاي دولت و مصرف آن در موارد معين
current_justification_en: Amends the executive bylaw of Article 61 of the Law on Collection of Certain Government Revenues and Their Use for Specified Purposes, a named earmarked-revenue mechanism feeding into government tax/revenue totals.

law_title_en: Addition of Text as Notes (1) and (2) to Clause (28) of the Executive Regulations of the National Budget for Year 1387 (2008-2009)
law_title_fa: اضافه شدن متني به عنوان تبصره هاي (1) و (2) به بند (28) ضوابط اجرايي بودجه سال 1387 كل كشور
current_justification_en: Adds implementing provisos to clause 28 of the 1387 (2008) Budget Execution Rules, part of that year's statutory budget-execution framework.

law_title_en: Bylaw on the Licensing and Operation of Brokers as Legal Entities
law_title_fa: آيين نامه اعطاي مجوز و فعاليت كارگزار  در قالب شخصيت حقوقي
current_justification_en: Establishes the licensing and operating rules for brokerage firms as legal entities, a structural rule that shapes the intermediary base underpinning Iran's stock-market trading and listing activity.

law_title_en: Addendum to the Notes of Articles 7 and 12 of the Executive Bylaws of the National Budget Acts for Years 1393 (2014-2015) and 1394 (2015-2016)
law_title_fa: الحاقيه به تبصره هاي مواد 7 و 12 از آيين نامه هاي اجرايي قوانين بودجه سال هاي 1393 و 1394 كل كشور
current_justification_en: Adds provisos to the implementing bylaws of Articles 7 and 12 of the 1393 and 1394 (2014-2015) Annual Budget Laws.

law_title_en: Resolution on Futures Contracts as a Financial Instrument and the Regulations Governing Futures Trading
law_title_fa: مصوبه ابزار مالي قراردادهاي آتي و مقررات مربوط به معاملات قراردادآتي
current_justification_en: Approves futures contracts as a financial instrument and sets related trading rules, directly expanding the range of tradable products underlying stock-market turnover and trading-value data.

law_title_en: Decree Concerning the Addition of a Note to Sub-item (2) of Item (a) of Clause (11) of the Executive Regulations of the National Budget for Year 1382 (2003-2004)
law_title_fa: تصويب نامه راجع به الحاق يك تبصره به جزﺀ (2) رديف (الف) بند (11)ضوابط اجرايي بودجه سال 1382 كل كشور
current_justification_en: Adds a proviso to clause 11 of the 1382 (2003) Budget Execution Rules, part of that year's statutory budget-execution framework.

law_title_en: Decree No. 36113/T27538H Dated 30 ... on Government Discretionary Punishments (Ta'zirat) Concerning the Smuggling of Goods and Currency
law_title_fa: تصويبنامه شماره 36113 ت 27538هـ مورخ 30  ...  تعزيرات حكومتي راجع به قاچاق كالا و ارز
current_justification_en: Sets discretionary punishments (Ta'zirat) for goods and currency smuggling, a direct enforcement instrument against black-market currency and trade flows that feed the parallel exchange-rate gap and official trade statistics.

law_title_en: Directive on the Handling of Violations by Persons Subject to Article 35 of the Securities Market Act
law_title_fa: دستورالعمل رسيدگي به تخلفات اشخاص موضوع ماده 35 قانون بازار اوراق بهادار
current_justification_en: Sets procedures for handling violations under Article 35 of the Securities Market Law, a compliance/enforcement rule that supports market integrity and, indirectly, investor participation.

law_title_en: Rules for the Use of Securities Offering Advisory Services
law_title_fa: ضوابط استفاده از خدمات مشاوران عرضه اوراق بهادار
current_justification_en: Sets rules for the use of securities-offering advisory services, part of the regulatory infrastructure supporting new listings and capital raising on the exchange.

law_title_en: Amendment to Decree No. 16449/T254K Dated ... Free Trade-Industrial Zones of the Islamic Republic of Iran
law_title_fa: اصلاح تصويبنامه شماره 16449  ت254ك مورخ  ...  آزاد تجاري - صنعتي جمهوري اسلامي ايران
current_justification_en: Amends the founding decree for Iran's Free Trade-Industrial Zones, a policy instrument specifically designed to attract foreign investment and boost trade flows through the zones.

law_title_en: Legal Bill Concerning the Crediting of Funds Collected from Installment Payments on Land to the Capital Increase Account of the Agricultural Cooperative Bank of Iran
law_title_fa: لايحه قانوني راجع به منظور نمودن وجوه حاصل از وصول قبوض اقساطي اراضي به حساب افزايش سرمايه به بانك تعاون كشاورزي ايران
targets_named_charts: Monetary Sector credit to private sector
Private Credit by Deposit Money Banks to GDP (World Bank GFDD)
current_justification_en: This decree increased the paid-in capital of the Agricultural Cooperative Bank, widening the pool of subsidized credit available to farmers; that credit channel is part of what shapes private-sector credit aggregates and, more diffusely, agricultural land-use and output.

law_title_en: Act Amending the Act on the Issuance of Treasury Bills and Bonds
law_title_fa: قانون اصلاح قانون انتشار اسناد خزانه و اوراق قرضه
targets_named_charts: Net incurrence of liabilities, total (% of GDP)
current_justification_en: Amends the law authorizing issuance of treasury bills and bonds, the core legal instrument for domestic public borrowing; it is a real, named channel for how the state finances deficits and accumulates domestic liabilities.

law_title_en: Act Authorizing the Application of the Minimum Customs Tariff to Merchandise from Iraq
law_title_fa: قانون اجازه اجراي حداقل تعرفه گمركي نسبت بمال التجاره مملكت عراق
current_justification_en: Sets a minimum customs tariff specifically for trade with Iraq, one of many bilateral tariff arrangements that together made up Iran's early tariff regime shaping import costs.

law_title_en: Act Authorizing the Determination of Customs Ground-Rent and Warehousing Fees
law_title_fa: قانون اجازه تعيين نرخ ارضيه و انبارداري گمرك
targets_named_charts: Logistics performance index: Efficiency of customs clearance process
current_justification_en: Authorizes setting customs storage and warehousing fee rates, a cost component of clearing imports through customs that feeds into overall logistics/customs-clearance efficiency and effective import costs.

law_title_en: Legal Bill Adding a Note to the Legal Bill on Customs Duty Exemption for Vegetable Oil, Approved 11/7/1358 (October 3, 1979)
law_title_fa: لايحه قانوني الحاق يك تبصره به لايحه قانوني معافيت حقوق گمركي رو غن نباتي مصوب  58 7 11
current_justification_en: Adds a customs-duty exemption clause specifically for vegetable oil imports, a direct, named channel lowering the landed cost of an imported food staple and thereby its domestic price and trade volume.

law_title_en: Act on the Punishment of Disruption of Agriculture and Animal Husbandry
law_title_fa: لايحه قانوني مجازات اخلال در امر كشاورزي و دامداري
current_justification_en: Criminalizes disruption of agricultural and livestock activity during the revolutionary upheaval, an instrument explicitly aimed at protecting farm output and continuity of production.

law_title_en: National Budget Act for Year 1306 (1927-1928) and Authorization to Pay National Expenditures as Determined by the Budget Commission in Esfand 1306 (February-March 1928)
law_title_fa: قانون بودجه سال 1306 مملكتي و اجازه پرداخت مخارج مملكتي بر طبق تشخيص كميسيون بودجه در اسفند ماه 1306
current_justification_en: A national (mamlekati) budget law is the country's central fiscal instrument; annual budget laws collectively define government spending and revenue and are exactly the kind of national-scale instrument any serious account of Iran's fiscal history and GDP trajectory must reference, even for an early instance like this 1928 law.

law_title_en: Bill Concerning the Use of the 20 Billion Rials Realized from Ending the Government Subsidy on Meat Prices in Tehran and Isfahan for the Improvement of Animal Husbandry and the Revival of Traditional Rural Animal Husbandry, as Amended
law_title_fa: لایحه قانونی راجع به استفاده از مبلغ ۲۰ میلیارد ریال حاصل از قطع کمک دولت به قیمت گوشت مصرفی تهران و اصفهان جهت بهبود ام
targets_named_charts: Meat of cattle with the bone, fresh or chilled, Producer Price
Meat of sheep, fresh or chilled, Producer Price
current_justification_en: Explicitly withdraws the government subsidy on meat prices in Tehran and Isfahan and redirects the funds to the livestock sector, a direct, named instrument targeting exactly the consumer price and supply of meat.

law_title_en: Act on the Employment of Technical Staff from Graduates of the Tirtash Technical School in Mazandaran
law_title_fa: قانون راجع باستخدام كادر فني از فارغ التحصيلان آموزشگاه تيرتاش مازندران
current_justification_en: This 1964 clause extends the Shah's land-reform program, the central plank of the White Revolution's rural modernization drive; land reform of this era reshaped Iran's growth path and belongs in any serious account of the GDP series for the 1960s-70s.

law_title_en: Act on the Employment of Technical Staff from Graduates of the Tirtash Technical School in Mazandaran
law_title_fa: قانون راجع باستخدام كادر فني از فارغ التحصيلان آموزشگاه تيرتاش مازندران
current_justification_en: As a direct amendment to the land-redistribution mechanism, this clause governs land tenure and farm-size structure, a real channel shaping agricultural land use and cropping patterns.

law_title_en: Legal Bill on Completing Certain Articles of the Land Reform Act
law_title_fa: لايحه قانوني راجع به تكميل پاره اي از مواد قانون اصلاحات ارضي
current_justification_en: Amends core land-reform law provisions in the immediate post-revolutionary period, part of the Islamic Republic's contested land-redistribution agenda; land policy of this scale is part of the backdrop any account of the 1980 GDP collapse should mention.

law_title_en: Legal Bill on Completing Certain Articles of the Land Reform Act
law_title_fa: لايحه قانوني راجع به تكميل پاره اي از مواد قانون اصلاحات ارضي
current_justification_en: As a direct amendment to land-reform provisions, it governs land tenure and redistribution terms, a real and named channel for agricultural land use.

law_title_en: Amendment to Article 10 of the Land Reform Amendment Act
law_title_fa: اصلاح ماده دهم قانون اصلاحي قانون اصلاحات ارضي
current_justification_en: This 1962 amendment to Article 10 of the land reform law is part of the opening act of the Shah's land-reform program, the signature policy of the pre-White-Revolution reform drive; land reform of this era is a national-scale program any serious GDP narrative for the 1960s must mention.

law_title_en: Amendment to Article 10 of the Land Reform Amendment Act
law_title_fa: اصلاح ماده دهم قانون اصلاحي قانون اصلاحات ارضي
current_justification_en: Directly amends land-redistribution terms under Article 10, a real channel shaping farm-size structure and land tenure.

law_title_en: Legal Bill on the Method of Securing Customs Duties and Commercial Benefit Tax and Extending Collection Guarantee Letters
law_title_fa: لايحه قانوني راجع به نحوه  تأمين حقوق  گمركي  و سود بازرگاني و تمديد ضمانتنامه هاي وصولي
targets_named_charts: Tariff rate, applied, simple mean, all products
current_justification_en: Governs the collection of customs duties and commercial profit tax and the extension of import guarantee letters, a real, named mechanism setting the effective cost and procedural burden of importing goods.

law_title_en: Declaration that the Cabinet Decree on the Collection of Asphalt Duty from Automobiles Assembled in Iran Is No Longer in Effect
law_title_fa: منتفي بودن تصويبنامه هيأت وزيران راجع بوصول عوارض اسفالت از اتومبيل هاي مونتاژ در ايران
targets_named_charts: National Motor Vehicle Production (incl. Paykan/Iran Khodro Milestones)
current_justification_en: Cancels a cabinet decree imposing an asphalt duty on domestically assembled cars, directly lowering a cost component of local vehicle assembly at a time when Iran's national auto industry (Paykan/Iran Khodro) was scaling up.

law_title_en: Act on the Forgiveness of All Government Claims for Rangeland Fees and Livestock Grazing Fines
law_title_fa: قانون بخشودگي كليه مطالبات دولت بابت حق مرتع و جرائم چراي دام
current_justification_en: Forgives government claims for grazing fees and fines on livestock, an agricultural subsidy-like debt-relief measure lightening the cost burden on livestock herders.

law_title_en: Amendment to the Executive Bylaw of the Anti-Money Laundering Act
law_title_fa: اصلاح آيين نامه اجرايي قانون مبارزه با پولشويي
current_justification_en: Amends the implementing bylaw of the anti-money-laundering law, tightening banking-sector compliance and controls, part of the broader regulatory environment shaping deposit and credit flows through the banking system.

law_title_en: Amendment to the Executive Bylaw on Monetary and Banking Operations in the Free Trade-Industrial Zones of the Islamic Republic of Iran
law_title_fa: اصلاح آيين نامه اجرايي عمليات پولي و بانكي در مناطق آزاد تجاري - صنعتي جمهوري اسلامي ايران
targets_named_charts: Domestic credit to private sector by banks (% of GDP)
Imports of goods and services (annual % growth)
current_justification_en: Amends the bylaw governing monetary and banking operations within Iran's free trade-industrial zones, shaping the credit and banking environment for firms operating in these zones, which are geared toward trade and investment.

law_title_en: Executive Bylaw of Article 25 of the Act on Removal of Obstacles to Competitive Production and Improvement of the Country's Financial System
law_title_fa: آيين نامه اجرايي ماده  25  قانون رفع موانع توليد رقابت پذير و ارتقاي نظام مالي كشور
targets_named_charts: Private Credit by Deposit Money Banks to GDP (World Bank GFDD)
GDP Value Added by 18 Economic-Activity Sectors, Current & Constant Prices (SH1390-1397)
current_justification_en: Implementing bylaw for the law on removing obstacles to production and improving the country's financial system, a real credit and financial-restructuring instrument explicitly aimed at unlocking bank financing for industrial firms.
